info.name: 100% Whole Wheat Sandwich Bread
info.description: 450 gram | Our whole wheat sandwich bread is hearty yet soft with a tender crumb and a lofty rise, making it ideal for your favourite sandwiches. The light, fluffy texture of the bread created with the addition of milk powder and butter makes it hearty and satisfying. Storage instructions - keep in a cool, dry & hygienic place, away from sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate in an airtight container. Key allergens -gluten, dairy [Energy: 1089.45 kcal, Allergen: gluten,milk, Protein: 43.65g, Carbohydrates: 194.85g, Fiber: 36.945g, Fat: 16.2g]

info.name: Soft Sourdough Sandwich Bread (450g)
info.description: 450 gram | Our soft sourdough is an artisan bread made using only 100% whole wheat flour. It has a pillowy soft, tender and light texture created with the addition of olive oil. This sourdough sandwich bread is incredible with just the right tang from the sourdough. Use it for sandwiches, french toast, making breadcrumbs, etc. Storage instructions - keep in a cool, dry & hygienic place, away from sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate in an airtight container. Key allergens -gluten [Energy: 1023.75 kcal, Allergen: gluten, Protein: 36g, Carbohydrates: 181.35g, Fat: 17.55g]

info.name: Buttercrust Milk Bread (470g)
info.description: 470 gram | Our buttercrust milk bread is soft, buttery and subtly sweet. With milk being the only liquid used in its preparation, it has a golden crust on the outside, and is fluffy on the inside. Pairing perfectly with artisanal jams, it makes for delicious sandwiches and toasts. Storage: keep in a cool, dry and hygienic place, away from direct sunlight. Once opened, store in an airtight container under refrigerated conditions. Key allergens - dairy, gluten [Energy: 1372.87 kcal, Allergen: milk,gluten, Protein: 35.72g, Carbohydrates: 208.68g, Fiber: 25.051g, Fat: 42.77g]

info.name: Multigrain Sandwich Bread (500gm)
info.description: 500 gram | Our multigrain sandwich bread is a versatile bread prepared with a mix of grains and seeds. Different grains increase the bread's depth of flavour, while seeds add to its texture and rich qualities. Sure to be an all-around favourite of kids, it makes for a hearty breakfast or an evening snack. Storage instructions - keep in a cool, dry & hygienic place, away from sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate in an airtight container. Key allergens - gluten, seeds & dairy [Energy: 1293.5 kcal, Allergen: milk,gluten, Protein: 49.5g, Carbohydrates: 209.5g, Fiber: 40.5g, Fat: 30g]

info.name: Multigrain Sourdough (420g)
info.description: 420 gram | Now in a new size! our multigrain sourdough bread is a versatile bread naturally leavened, without commercial yeast and prepared with a mix of grains & multi-seed. This addition of different grains increases the depth of flavour. The seeds add texture & flavour of their own, further enhancing the deep, rich qualities of our bread. Storage instructions - keep in a cool, dry & hygienic place, away from sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate in an airtight container. Key allergens - gluten, seeds [Energy: 876.54 kcal, Allergen: gluten, Protein: 31.5g, Carbohydrates: 161.28g, Fiber: 39.354g, Fat: 11.34g]

info.name: Country Sourdough (350g)
info.description: 350 gram | Now in a new size!  our country sourdough bread is an artisan bread made with only three ingredients, flour, water & salt, naturally leavened without using commercial yeast. Its sour flavour, and chewy texture makes it perfect for sandwiches and toasts. Storage: keep in a cool, dry and hygienic place, away from direct sunlight. Once opened, store in an airtight container under refrigerated conditions. Key allergens - gluten [Energy: 809.305 kcal, Allergen: gluten, Protein: 32.34g, Carbohydrates: 166.6g, Fiber: 27.125g, Fat: 1.505g]

info.name: 100% Whole Wheat Sourdough (450g)
info.description: 450 gram | Now in a new size! our 100% whole wheat sourdough is an artisan bread naturally leavened without commercial yeast, made using only 100% whole wheat flour. This dense, whole-grain loaf has a deep, nutty, earthy flavor and tastes slightly more sour than our other sourdough breads, making it perfect for a wholesome meal. Storage instructions - keep in a cool, dry & hygienic place, away from direct sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate in an airtight container. info.name: Dhak Blend | Aluminium Coffee Capsules
info.description: Named after one of our favourite spring blossoms, the dhak blend is roasted dark to bring out deep flavours of dark chocolate and fruit jam. Its heavy cocoa body leaves a smooth lingering aftertaste and makes for a bold, well-rounded cup of coffee.

info.name: Silver Oak Cafe Blend | Aluminium Coffee Capsules
info.description: This medium roast is our signature house blend and is used to brew espresso-based coffees across our cafes. The silver oak blend is an extremely versatile choice that has a balanced flavour profile and works really well as an espresso.

info.name: Attikan Estate | Aluminium Coffee Capsules [Pack of 10]
info.description: Sweet with fruity overtones and balanced acidity, attikan estate is the darkest of our standard medium roasts and is perfect to brew an espresso with. It boasts of a bold and fruity profile, rounded off with a hint of nuttiness.

info.name: Vienna Roast | Aluminium Coffee Capsules
info.description: The second darkest of our roasts, this blend has a great body, low acidity and is a favourite choice for coffee drinkers who enjoy a strong cup, with the characteristic bittersweet notes

info.name: Cold Brew Kalledeverapura Bags
info.description: Enjoy hassle-free cold brew with our easy-to-use bags - great for beginners and seasoned brewers alike! this single estate cold brew is a medium roast sourced from one of our oldest farm partners, kalledevarapura estate, situated in the hills of chikmagalur. With beautiful notes of stone fruit and toffee, this blend can be enjoyed black or with milk.

info.name: Cold Brew Bold Blend Bags
info.description: Enjoy hassle-free cold brew with our easy-to-use bags - great for beginners and seasoned brewers alike! our cold brew bold is a dark roast perfect for those who enjoy a robust kick in their coffee and prefer low acidity. This blend has a nutty flavour profile with notes of dark chocolate and roasted nuts. Perfect for milky drinks.

info.name: Cold Brew Light Blend Bags
info.description: Enjoy hassle-free cold brew with our easy-to-use bags - great for beginners and seasoned brewers alike! if you enjoy a fruity flavour profile, this one’s for you. Our cold brew light is a refreshing blend that shines with fruity notes of berry and subtle hints of white chocolate, best consumed black.

info.name: Monsoon Malabar
info.description: Nutty + earthy if you like your coffee dark, but not too much, our monsoon malabar aa is perfect for you with earthy notes, this big bodied coffee finishes nutty with minimal acidity and notes of spice. Each box contains 10 easy pour sachets

info.name: Attikan Estate, Medium Dark Roast
info.description: If you like your coffee a little dark, but not too much, this one is perfect for you. It has low acidity and flavor notes of figs, dark chocolate, and roasted almonds. The delicious nuttiness of this medium dark roast hits all the right notes, whether enjoyed with milk or black. Each box contains 10 easy pour sachets

info.name: Seethargundu Estate, Light Roast
info.description: Light + fruity seethargundu estate is an old blue tokai favourite and a treat for light roast fans. With taste notes of black tea, raisin and hazelnut, it s perfect for when you need that instant pick me up each box contains 10 easy pour sachets

info.name: Mixed, Light To Dark Roasts
info.description: Our mixed bag contains a range of single estate coffees, roasted from light to dark, so you can try them all. The nachammai estate is a light roast that makes a fruity and zesty cup while vienna is a dark roast that is bitter and bold. In the middle range, thogarihunkal estate is a fruity medium roast and the attikan estate is medium dark that packs a nutty, chocolatey punch each box contains 10 easy pour sachets

info.name: French Roast, Very Dark Roast
info.description: Cocoa + bittersweet savour the bittersweet and cocoa notes of our darkest roast. If you like your coffee bittersweet and with minimal acidity, our french roast is perfect for you

info.name: Jacaranda Blend, Medium Dark Roast
info.description: Chocolatey + sweet with low acidity and a nutty flavour profile, the chocolatey and sweet flavours of our jacaranda blend tastes wonderful black or with a dash of milk. This blend is made from naturally processed arabica from gowri estate, washed arabica from baarbara estate and robusta from kerehaklu estate

info.name: Vienna, Dark Roast
info.description: Bold + strong oaky, with overtones of cocoa and a hint of bitterness, this smooth dark roast is a classic. Every cup is heavy bodied with low acidity and is perfect for those who love the sharp, bold taste of coffee each box contains 10 easy pour sachets

info.name: Baarbara Estate [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has medium-high acidity and medium-high bitterness. Our medium dark coffee from baarbara estate has a wonderful aroma of sweet caramel and dried apricot. To taste the syrupy, smooth mouthfeel of this coffee, we recommend brewing it as a pour over, an espresso or using an aeropress, moka pot or a french press.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Vienna Roast [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has low acidity and high bitterness. The second darkest of our roasts, this blend has great body, low acidity and is a favourite choice for coffee drinkers who enjoy a strong cup, with the characteristic bittersweet notes. We recommend brewing this as an espresso, moka pot, french press, south indian filter.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Silver Oak Blend [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has medium acidity and medium bitterness. Enjoy our signature house blend that we serve in our cafes! this versatile medium roast features a combination of washed and unwashed coffees to create a balanced profile that works well in espresso based drinks as well as in manual brews such as the aeropress, pour over or in cold brews.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: French Roast [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has low acidity and high bitterness. Our darkest roasted coffee is a blend best enjoyed black for those who like their coffee bold, like a traditional espresso. If you’re looking to add milk and still retain a definite bite, this is a great choice. We recommend brewing this as an espresso, moka pot, french press or south indian filter.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Basankhan Estate [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has low acidity and medium-high bitterness. This dark roasted coffee is a journey of rich, complex flavours. Savour the velvety mouthfeel reminiscent of dark chocolate, which enhances the overall richness of this brew. The coffee’s body is heavy and round, creating a luscious and full-bodied experience for your palate.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Attikan Estate
info.description: This coffee has medium acidity and medium-high bitterness. Sweet with fruity overtones and balanced acidity, this is the darkest of our standard medium roasts and recommended for espresso lovers. It is a versatile coffee that also works for manual brewing such as moka pot, south indian filter and aeropress.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Cold Brew Blend Bold [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has low acidity and medium-high bitterness. Our bold cold brew blend is roasted medium-dark that gives a full bodied glass of refreshing cold brew. With notes of dark chocolate, toffee, and roasted nuts, this blend has very little acidity and a bittersweet finish.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Amaltas Blend [250 gms]
info.description: An ode to the vibrant burst of yellow that marks the beginning of indian summers, this blend is our go-to choice for crafting a refreshing batch of coffee including cold brews. In fact, this was originally called the cold bold blend but owing to its diversity (its flavours shine through in a pour over or aeropress), we decided to rename it after one of our favourite neighbourhood trees.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Dhak Blend [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has low acidity and medium-high bitterness. The coffees used in our dhak blend are naturally processed which means that the coffee bean is dried with the cherry, resulting in complex, fruity and sweet flavours. We recommend this dark roast for espresso-based drinks as well as manual brews such as the moka pot and the french press.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Krishnagiri Estate [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has medium acidity and bitterness. The washed coffee has been handpicked, manually sorted and processed implementing traditional processing practices. The pulped beans are fermented overnight and then sun-dried in the yard for a week.

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Kalledevarapura Estate [250 gms]
info.description: This coffee has low acidity and high bitterness. This year’s harvest from kalledevarapura has a medium body and a light, tea-like mouthfeel which our roasters recommend enjoying as an espresso, cold brew, pour over or aeropress. With notes of brown sugar, roasted almond, and raisin, this is perfect to start your day with!

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: Winter Blend (250 Gms)
info.description: This coffee treats you to a balanced acidity and a pleasant sweetness. A medium-roasted blend crafted using natural and washed coffees, it brews cups with comforting notes, perfect for cosying up this winter. Tasting notes: orange, chocolate, dried fruit    processing: washed + natural      roast level: medium

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)
Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V01 (White)

info.name: St. Joseph Estate (250 Gms)
info.description: Meet the first coffee from our newest partner farm, a medium-dark roast with medium acidity and sweetness. Processed using the washed method, this coffee brews cups with a chocolatey and nutty flavour profile. Tasting notes: grapefruit, roasted almonds, toffee    processing: washed    roast level: medium dark

choices.name: Blue Tokai V60 Filter Paper - Size V02 (White)

info.name: Nilgiri Travel Tumbler- 500ml
info.description: Introducing the nilgiri travel tumbler – your trusted partner for every journey, whether it’s a bustling workday or when you’re out and about. Crafted with food-grade stainless steel, this sleek tumbler bottle combines durability with modern design. Its leak-proof construction ensures your favourite brews stay secure, allowing you to move effortlessly without spills or mess. The nilgiri travel tumbler is built for the perpetual wanderer who values both style and functionality.

info.name: Coromandel Sipper- 500 Ml
info.description: Meet the coromandel sipper – your ultimate travel companion for life on the go. Crafted from food-grade stainless steel, this sleek and durable sipper bottle is perfect for busy commutes or weekends with plans. Lightweight yet sturdy, it’s designed to prevent spills, making every adventure seamless and mess-free.

info.name: Multi-seed Millet Cookies (Pack Of 10)
info.description: Indulge in our guilt-free cookies, packed with a crunchy, wholesome blend of assorted seeds.  [Allergen: milk,gluten]

info.name: Oatmeal & Cranberry Cookies (Pack Of 10)
info.description: Experience the sweetness of dried cranberries and wholesome oats in chewy, soft, and crispy cookies, crafted with 100% butter.  [Allergen: milk,gluten]

info.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies (Pack Of 10)
info.description: Delight in the wholesome goodness of amaranth and whole wheat flour, crafted with 100% butter for a chewy, crunchy treat.  [Allergen: milk,gluten,soy]

info.name: Wheat Bran Coconut Cookies (Pack Of 10)
info.description: Packed with flavour, loaded with fiber and naturally sweetened with jaggery. Crafted with 100% butter.  [Allergen: milk,gluten]

info.name: Cacao & Berry Chocolate
info.description: 70% dark chocolate with sweet berries from mahabaleshwar for a quick delicious treat.

info.name: Cascara Cold Brew [Single Can]
info.description: Tea-like, made with 100 percent arabica cherries.
